1245809814.name: St0mp-EE5

2647299044.perkDescription: Threaded Spike can bounce to Tangles, detonating them and returning immediately. Tangles detonated by Threaded Spike are rewoven and retrieved by it. Catches without a Tangle refund extra melee energy.

3831935023.perkDescription: Targets frozen by your Winter's Wrath Super take increased Shatter damage. Allies in range of your Winter's Wrath shockwave and Frostpulse gain Frost Armor and deal increased damage with Stasis weapons. Granting these buffs to allies grants you Super energy.

4057299718.name: Chromatic Fire
4057299718.perkDescription:
Final blows from Kinetic weapons create an explosion in the element of your equipped Super that deals damage and applies a matching elemental effect:
• [Arc] Blinds targets.
• [Solar] Scorches targets.
• [Void] Weakens targets.
• [Stasis] Slows targets.
• [Strand] Severs targets.
Elemental final blows temporarily increase the explosion's size. Precision final blows always maximum the explosion's size.

171695625.name: Claws of Ahamkara
171695625.perkDescription: Gain an additional melee charge. Powered melee final blows spawn an Orb of Power.

2439379860.name: Phoenix Cradle
2439379860.perkDescription: Sol Invictus lasts twice as long. Allies who pass through your Sunspot are granted Sol Invictus and Restoration. Dealing sustained [Solar]Solar damage in a Sunspot extends the duration of the Sunspot. Applying Solar buffs to allies has a chance to create a Sunspot at your feet.

53126581.name: Lion Rampant
53126581.perkDescription: Increases hip-fire range and accuracy for Primary ammo weapons. Grants additional aerial maneuverability and enables airborne firing during Lift. Increases the airborne effectiveness stat of all weapons.

3093309525.name: Triton Vice
3093309525.perkDescription: Increases Glaive reload speed and melee damage when surrounded. Glaive melee final blows overflow a round to the magazine. Glaive projectile final blows detonate in an explosion.

3768376419.name: Actium War Rig
3768376419.perkDescription: Steadily reloads a portion of your equipped Auto Rifle or Machine Gun's magazine from reserves. Final blows with Auto Rifles or Machine Guns boost their stability, ammo generation, and damage. Provides a moderate benefit to their airborne effectiveness.

2166230715.name: Sealed Ahamkara Grasps
2166230715.perkDescription: Powered melee and finisher final blows grant Nightmare Fuel, increasing handling and airborne effectiveness. While active, freshly drawn weapons deal additional damage and grant Nightmare Fuel on final blows. Gaining Nightmare Fuel reloads all holstered weapons. Increased mobility.

2915174768.name: Mask of Fealty
2915174768.perkDescription: Withering Blade hits and bounces create a small Stasis crystal and refund a portion of melee energy. Using Withering Blade to shatter crystals or frozen targets releases a spread of Withering Blades.

3301944824.name: Mantle of Battle Harmony
3301944824.perkDescription: Final blows or sustained damage with weapons matching your equipped Super damage type grant you Super energy. When your Super energy is full, you instead gain a temporary bonus to weapon damage of that type. When you've exhausted your Super, matching elemental weapons' damage temporarily causes explosions around the target.

2999866952.name: Armamentarium
2999866952.perkDescription: Gain an additional grenade charge. Grenade final blows spawn an Orb of Power. Weapon final blows grant grenade energy. Activating your grenade ability reloads your equipped weapon from reserves.

3960926757.name: Knucklehead Radar
3960926757.perkDescription: Provides radar while you're aiming. Enhances your radar resolution while crouched. Visually marks targets. Deals more damage to low-health marked targets. Provides a small benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of all weapons.

2002759681.name: Synthoceps
2002759681.perkDescription: When you're surrounded, gain increased melee and Super damage, as well as improved weapon handling and reload speed.

2867399974.name: Melas Panoplia
2867399974.perkDescription: Collecting a Firesprite or rapid Solar final blows make you a Forge Master, allowing you to recall your Throwing Hammer. After impacting a target, recall your hammer at full intensity to perform a Perfect Recall, causing an explosion of forge slag. Perfect Recalls and collecting Firesprites extend your time as a Forge Master.

900910759.name: Karnstein Armlets
900910759.perkDescription: Melee and finisher final blows instantly grant cure and provide restoration for a short duration.

461841403.name: Gyrfalcon's Hauberk
461841403.perkDescription: Your Void weapons gain Volatile Rounds after you emerge from being invisible. When you are invisible and defeat a combatant while using a finisher, all of your weapons gain bonus damage; you and your nearby allies gain a reserve overshield and improved class ability regeneration. These reserve overshields can be deployed by using a class ability.

2757274117.name: Khepri's Sting
2757274117.perkDescription: Defeating a weakened target releases a burst of weakening smoke and refunds Void melee ability energy.

2578771006.name: One-Eyed Mask
2578771006.perkDescription: Highlights the target who dares to damage you. Track down and destroy them for an overshield.

1219761634.name: The Bombardiers
1219761634.perkDescription:
Dodging leaves behind an explosive that detonates after a short delay, damaging targets around it and creating a secondary effect based on your Super's element:
• [Arc] Blinds targets.
• [Solar] Scorches targets.
• [Void] Suppresses targets.
• [Stasis] Slows targets.
• [Strand] Severs targets.

3050017626.name: Skull of Dire Ahamkara
3050017626.perkDescription:
After casting a Nova Bomb, briefly gain a free cast of a fast-moving but weaker Nova Bomb: Lance. Your Nova Bomb: Cataclysm is empowered if detonated with another Nova Bomb. 
Nova Bomb final blows and weapon final blows while you have Devour grant Super energy.

4035625646.name: Astrocyte Verse
4035625646.perkDescription:
With Blink equipped, use [Air Dodge]  while airborne to perform a Dark Blink.

Using Blink or Dark Blink grants Volatile Rounds. Blink travels farther, causes nearby targets to become volatile, and has a shorter cooldown. While your Nova Warp Super is active, Dark Blink does not cost Super energy. Provides a moderate benefit to airborne effectiveness for all weapons.

1667080809.name: Foetracer
1667080809.perkDescription: Damaging a powerful combatant or Guardian with an ability temporarily increases weapon damage of the same type. Defeating that marked target with damage that matches the element creates an Elemental pickup. Increased resilience.

4060352315.name: Mask of the Quiet One
4060352315.perkDescription: Grants ability energy when you are damaged. While you have a Void super equipped, rapid final blows and final blows while critically wounded grant Devour.

523456396.name: Arbor Warden
523456396.perkDescription: Using your class ability channels defensive Light inward, providing a grenade that creates a barricade on impact. Picking up Orbs of Power enhances your next Barri-nade, spawning more barricades on impact.

597039524.name: Boots of the Assembler
597039524.perkDescription: Standing in a rift creates Noble Seekers that seek out allies and heal them. Standing in an empowering rift creates Noble Seekers that grant both you and your ally a damage bonus. When a Noble Seeker finds an ally, you gain class ability energy. Increases the airborne effectiveness stat of the Hand Cannon Lumina.

903984858.name: Lucky Raspberry
903984858.perkDescription: Arcbolt Grenades have increased chaining capabilities and jolt targets hit. Damaging combatants with jolt or applying jolt to targets grants additional Arcbolt Grenade energy.

2169905051.name: Renewal Grasps

3790373074.name: Lion Rampant
3790373074.perkDescription: Increases hip-fire range and accuracy for Primary ammo weapons. Grants additional aerial maneuverability and enables airborne firing during Lift. Increases the airborne effectiveness stat of all weapons. Increased mobility.

2405271937.name: St0mp-EE5
2405271937.perkDescription: Increases slide distance and improves High Jump, Strafe Jump, and Triple Jump. Take less damage from targets when airborne.

2384488862.name: Khepri's Horn

3768376418.name: Crest of Alpha Lupi
3768376418.perkDescription: Generates an additional Orb of Power from Supers. Generating a Barricade, or dealing sustained damage or defeating targets from behind one creates a healing pulse. Healing your allies grants Barricade energy.

2463947681.name: Swarmers

728668916.name: Felwinter's Helm

368733541.name: The Dragon's Shadow

1003391927.name: Mataiodoxía
1003391927.perkDescription: Targets damaged by Arcane Needle emit a suspending detonation when defeated. Your Arcane Needles are strong against [Shield-Piercing]Barrier Champions.

3267996858.name: No Backup Plans

Provides a moderate benefit to Shotgun airborne effectiveness and reload speed.

1474735276.name: Gwisin Vest

Each Spectral Blades hit or final blow you make before becoming invisible will restore more of your Super energy.

Exiting invisibility while near a target creates a cloud of weakening smoke around you.

419976110.name: Raiden Flux
419976110.perkDescription: Quick successive attacks with Arc Staff increase its damage output, duration and jolt targets hit. Increased resilience.

308767728.name: Point-Contact Cannon Brace
308767728.perkDescription: Defeating targets with your Thunderclap melee restores melee energy. Targets near you when you use your Thunderclap suffer lightning strikes and become jolted; being amplified increases the damage of these lightning strikes.

2766109872.name: Raiden Flux
2766109872.perkDescription: Quick successive attacks with Arc Staff increase its damage output, duration and jolt targets hit.

3050442980.name: Hazardous Propulsion
3050442980.perkDescription: Weapon precision hits or final blows have a chance to load a Kinetic Exodus micro-missile. Activating your class ability fires loaded Exodus micro-missiles. Damaging targets with Exodus micro-missiles temporarily increases the damage you deal with other micro-missiles and Rocket Launchers.

4057299719.name: Phoenix Protocol
4057299719.perkDescription: Kills and assists you make while standing in your Well of Radiance return Super energy.

3045642045.name: Boots of the Assembler
3045642045.perkDescription: Standing in a rift creates Noble Seekers that seek out allies and heal them. Standing in an empowering rift creates Noble Seekers that grant both you and your ally a damage bonus. When a Noble Seeker finds an ally, you gain class ability energy. Increases the airborne effectiveness stat of the Hand Cannon Lumina.

1488061763.name: Gemini Jester
1488061763.perkDescription: Dodging disorients nearby enemies and temporarily removes their radar. Increased mobility.

241462142.name: Synthoceps
241462142.perkDescription: When you're surrounded, gain increased melee and Super damage, as well as improved weapon handling and reload speed.

138282166.name: Transversive Steps
138282166.perkDescription: Sprint speed increased. After a short time sprinting, your currently equipped weapon is automatically reloaded.

1429817243.name: Severance Enclosure
1429817243.perkDescription: Powered melee final blows unleash a damaging explosion. Finishers and final blows against more powerful targets increase the radius and damage of the explosion.

2002759682.name: Doom Fang Pauldron
2002759682.perkDescription:
Defeating targets with Void damage has a chance to grant an escalating bonus to damage with Void weapons. Defeating targets with Void melee grants Super energy.

While Sentinel Shield is active, defeating targets with melee attacks recharges Shield Throw, which extends your Super on hitting a target.

2255796155.name: Peregrine Greaves
2255796155.perkDescription: All shoulder charge abilities (Seismic Strike, Hammer Strike, or Shield Bash) deal bonus damage when activated in the air. Damaging mini-bosses, Tormentors, or Champions with your shoulder charge refunds your melee. Provides a small benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of all weapons.

3545094010.name: Phoenix Protocol
3545094010.perkDescription: Kills and assists you make while standing in your Well of Radiance return Super energy.

1611241895.name: Shinobu's Vow
1611241895.perkDescription: Gain an additional Skip Grenade charge. Skip Grenade damage grants Bolt Chargeand gaining Bolt Charge grants Skip Grenade energy. When Bolt Charge is ready, you heal nearby allies and enhance your next Skip Grenade.

1407595207.name: An Insurmountable Skullfort
1407595207.perkDescription: Final blows with Arc melees trigger health regeneration and fully restore a melee charge. Melee hits grant Arc melee energy.

863908533.name: Blight Ranger
863908533.perkDescription: Guarding with your Arc Staff does not consume extra Super energy. [Super]  : Cancel Arc Staff early, temporarily increasing Arc weapon damage and creating a blinding burst. Reflected attacks increase the damage of the burst, extend your Super, and deal additional damage.

3488362706.name: Chromatic Fire
3488362706.perkDescription:
Final blows from Kinetic weapons create an explosion in the element of your equipped Super that deals damage and applies a matching elemental effect:
• [Arc] Blinds targets.
• [Solar] Scorches targets.
• [Void] Weakens targets.
• [Stasis] Slows targets.
• [Strand] Severs targets.
Elemental final blows temporarily increase the explosion's size. Precision final blows always maximum the explosion's size. Increased mobility.

925466718.name: Crown of Tempests
925466718.perkDescription:
While you have an Arc ability equipped, Arc ability or Jolt final blows increase the recharge rate of your abilities and extend the duration of Stormtrance.

While you have Conduction Tines, Ionic Sentry creates a Storm Grenade when it deploys.

1862800747.name: Sunbracers
1862800747.perkDescription: Increases the duration of Solar Grenades. Solar melee kills grant unlimited Solar Grenade energy for a brief time. Increased mobility.

68357813.name: Ophidian Aspect
68357813.perkDescription: Improves melee range as well as ready speed and reload for weapons. Provides a small benefit to airborne effectiveness for all weapons. Increased mobility.

4258262391.name: Loreley Splendor Helm
4258262391.perkDescription: While you have a Solar Super equipped, casting your Barricade or becoming critically wounded with full class ability energy creates a Sunspot at your location.

1098931324.name: Oathkeeper
1098931324.perkDescription: Bow perfect draw can be held indefinitely. Gain a bonus to the Bow's damage when released, based on how long perfect draw was held. Provides a moderate benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of Bows. Increased mobility.

2954558332.name: Lunafaction Boots
2954558332.perkDescription: Increases hip-fire range and accuracy for Primary ammo weapons. Your Rifts gain the additional ability to increase weapon reload speeds. Empowering Rift makes weapons effective at longer ranges. Increased mobility.

2203146422.name: Assassin's Cowl
2203146422.perkDescription: Powered melee final blows grant invisibility and restore a portion of health and shields. Finishers and final blows against more powerful targets increase the duration of the invisibility and the amount of health and shields restored.

3234692237.name: Briarbinds
3234692237.perkDescription: Your Void Souls have a longer duration. They also gain escalating damage and durability as they defeat targets. You can retrieve your Void Souls by interacting with them, allowing them to be redeployed.

510504540.name: Khepri's Horn
510504540.perkDescription: Solar final blows recharge your Barricade. While you have a Solar Super equipped, casting your Barricade unleashes waves of Solar energy that damage and scorch targets. Combatants damaged and Guardians defeated by these waves are enveloped in a Sunspot. Increased resilience.

197761153.name: An Insurmountable Skullfort
197761153.perkDescription: Final blows with Arc melees trigger health regeneration and fully restore a melee charge. Melee hits grant Arc melee energy. Increased mobility.

511888814.name: Secant Filaments
511888814.perkDescription: While using a Void Super, casting an Empowering Rift will grant you Devour. Damage dealt by you and your allies from within your Empowering Rift will [Disruption] disrupt combatants. Defeating a target while Devour is active grants you class ability energy.

4070560771.name: The Sixth Coyote
4070560771.perkDescription: Gain a second dodge charge. Shortly after dodging, your next weapon final blow spawns an Orb of Power. Increased resilience.

3534173884.name: Mothkeeper's Wraps
3534173884.perkDescription:
Defeat targets to charge up cages of loyal moths that fly toward nearby targets or allies.
 
[Grenade]  : Throw the cage of loyal moths, which are released on impact. Upon reaching targets, moths detonate in a blinding explosion; upon reaching allies, moths provide a Void overshield.

2447096246.name: Gyrfalcon's Hauberk
2447096246.perkDescription: Your Void weapons gain Volatile Rounds after you emerge from being invisible. When you are invisible and defeat a combatant while using a finisher, all of your weapons gain bonus damage; you and your nearby allies gain a reserve overshield and improved class ability regeneration. These reserve overshields can be deployed by using a class ability.

691578978.name: Oathkeeper
691578978.perkDescription: Bow perfect draw can be held indefinitely. Gain a bonus to the Bow's damage when released, based on how long perfect draw was held. Provides a moderate benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of Bows.

50291571.name: Speaker's Sight
50291571.perkDescription: Healing grenades spawn a Restorative Turret. Healing allies occasionally spawns an Orb of Power.

1190497097.name: Citan's Ramparts
1190497097.perkDescription: You and allies can shoot through your Towering Barricade. Your Towering Barricade takes increased damage from Guardians.

1322544481.name: Hoarfrost-Z
1322544481.perkDescription: While you have a Stasis Super equipped, your Barricade becomes a wall of Stasis crystals that slows nearby targets when created. Standing behind this barricade will grant you and your allies increased weapon reload speed, stability, and range.

458095282.name: Hallowfire Heart
458095282.perkDescription:
While your Solar Super is charged, ability final blows cure you and give stacks of Sunfire Furnace.

While Sunfire Furnace is active, grenade and Shieldburst final blows trigger an ignition. Each stack increases grenade regeneration, class ability regeneration, and Super damage. Upon exiting your Super, all stacks are converted into Super energy. Increased resilience.

599049453.name: Starfire Protocol
599049453.perkDescription: Fusion Grenades have an additional charge and recharge from empowered weapon damage, with empowered weapon final blows granting more energy. Defeating targets with Fusion Grenades grant Rift energy.

1624882687.name: Rain of Fire
1624882687.perkDescription: Air dodge reloads all of your weapons and improves the airborne effectiveness of Fusion Rifles and Linear Fusion Rifles; final blows with these weapons make you radiant. Provides a moderate benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of Fusion Rifles and Linear Fusion Rifles.

3627185503.name: Ophidian Aspect
3627185503.perkDescription: Improves melee range as well as ready speed and reload for weapons. Provides a small benefit to airborne effectiveness for all weapons.

4136768282.name: Lunafaction Boots
4136768282.perkDescription: Increases hip-fire range and accuracy for Primary ammo weapons. Your Rifts gain the additional ability to increase weapon reload speeds. Empowering Rift makes weapons effective at longer ranges.

900910756.name: Winter's Guile
900910756.perkDescription: Melee and finisher final blows increase melee damage. With maximum stacks, you gain vastly increased melee regeneration speed for a short time.

3974038291.name: Precious Scars
3974038291.perkDescription: Final blows from weapons with a damage type matching your Super create a burst of healing around you that grants allies restoration. After reviving or being revived, you gain an aura that provides overshields to you and nearby allies.

3216110440.name: An Insurmountable Skullfort
3216110440.perkDescription: Final blows with Arc melees trigger health regeneration and fully restore a melee charge. Melee hits grant Arc melee energy.

858758105.name: Khepri's Horn
858758105.perkDescription: Solar final blows recharge your Barricade. While you have a Solar Super equipped, casting your Barricade unleashes waves of Solar energy that damage and scorch targets. Combatants damaged and Guardians defeated by these waves are enveloped in a Sunspot.

2829609851.name: Armamentarium
2829609851.perkDescription: Gain an additional grenade charge. Grenade final blows spawn an Orb of Power. Weapon final blows grant grenade energy. Activating your grenade ability reloads your equipped weapon from reserves. Increased resilience.

3488362707.name: Phoenix Protocol
3488362707.perkDescription: Kills and assists you make while standing in your Well of Radiance return Super energy. Increased mobility.

1591207518.name: Actium War Rig
1591207518.perkDescription: Steadily reloads a portion of your equipped Auto Rifle or Machine Gun's magazine from reserves. Final blows with Auto Rifles or Machine Guns boost their stability, ammo generation, and damage. Provides a moderate benefit to their airborne effectiveness.

300502917.name: Nothing Manacles
300502917.perkDescription: You gain an additional Scatter Grenade charge. Enables tracking for Scatter Grenade projectiles. Scatter Grenade final blows create additional Scatter Grenade projectiles.

1955548646.name: Mataiodoxía
1955548646.perkDescription: Targets damaged by Arcane Needle emit a suspending detonation when defeated. Landing multiple Arcane Needles or Needlestorm on the same target immediately triggers a larger, more powerful detonation. Defeating suspended targets grants melee energy. Your Arcane Needles are strong against [Shield-Piercing]Barrier Champions.

3539357318.name: Lion Rampant
3539357318.perkDescription: Increases hip-fire range and accuracy for Primary ammo weapons. Grants additional aerial maneuverability and enables airborne firing during Lift. Increases the airborne effectiveness stat of all weapons.

1437375562.name: Dunemarchers
1437375562.perkDescription: Increases sprint speed. Sprinting builds up a static charge. After melee-attacking a combatant, that charge will chain damage to nearby foes. Gain Bolt Charge per target hit by the chain.

2428181146.name: Verity's Brow
2428181146.perkDescription: Weapon final blows with a damage type matching your grenade grant Death Throes, which provide a grenade damage bonus and grant you grenade energy. When you have Death Throes and throw a grenade, nearby allies gain greatly increased grenade regeneration for a short time.

730200061.name: No Backup Plans
730200061.perkDescription: Shotgun and melee final blows start your health regeneration. While you have a defensive buff (Void Overshield, Amplified, Restoration, Frost Armor, Woven Mail), your Shotguns and melees deal additional damage and final blows with either extend the duration of those buffs. Provides a moderate benefit to Shotgun airborne effectiveness and reload speed.

1006498763.name: Star-Eater Scales
1006498763.perkDescription: You gain additional Super energy from Orbs of Power you pick up. While your Super energy is full, picking up an Orb of Power overcharges your Super, causing you to gain a burst of healing when cast and a bonus to your Super damage. At maximum overcharge, you also gain an overshield.

3608857511.name: Geomag Stabilizers
3608857511.perkDescription: Damaging targets with Chaos Reach extends its duration. Collecting Ionic Traces grants you energy for Chaos Reach. Sprinting while near max Bolt Charge will grant stacks over time.

1747063685.name: Stormdancer's Brace
1747063685.perkDescription: Stormtrance hits and final blows increase the damage it deals. Refunds Super energy when it ends. While Stormtrance is equipped, ability damage while amplified grants Bolt Charge.

3883286570.name: Shards of Galanor
3883286570.perkDescription: Throwing Knife final blows decrease the cooldown of your Super. Hitting a single target with most Blade Barrage knives in a volley causes them to release a violent Solar explosion; releasing scorching Solar shrapnel. Hits and final blows with Blade Barrage will return Super energy after the Super ends.

1862800746.name: Karnstein Armlets
1862800746.perkDescription: Melee and finisher final blows instantly grant cure and provide restoration for a short duration. Increased mobility.

3926392527.name: Graviton Forfeit
3926392527.perkDescription: Increases the duration of any invisibility effects. When you gain invisibility, your grenade, melee and class abilities recharge faster. At maximum stacks, you gain a Void Overshield as well. Increased resilience.

2574019120.name: Mechaneer's Tricksleeves
2574019120.perkDescription: Increases Sidearm airborne effectiveness, ready speed, and reload speed. While you're critically wounded, swapping to a Sidearm reloads it and increases its damage. While this effect is active, Sidearm final blows reload the weapon and extend the effect's duration.

1703598057.name: Point-Contact Cannon Brace
1703598057.perkDescription: Defeating targets with your Thunderclap melee restores melee energy. Targets near you when you use your Thunderclap suffer lightning strikes and become jolted; being amplified increases the damage of these lightning strikes.

3790373072.name: Dunemarchers
3790373072.perkDescription: Increases sprint speed. Sprinting builds up a static charge. After melee-attacking a combatant, that charge will chain damage to nearby foes. Gain Bolt Charge per target hit by the chain. Increased mobility.

2082483156.name: Starfire Protocol
2082483156.perkDescription: Fusion Grenades have an additional charge and recharge from empowered weapon damage, with empowered weapon final blows granting more energy. Defeating targets with Fusion Grenades grant Rift energy.

1978467312.name: Precious Scars
1978467312.perkDescription: Final blows from weapons with a damage type matching your Super create a burst of healing around you that grants allies restoration. After reviving or being revived, you gain an aura that provides overshields to you and nearby allies.

1643575148.name: Eternal Warrior
1643575148.perkDescription: [Arc]Arc final blows grant an escalating damage bonus with Arc weapons. While using Fist of Havoc, activating your Super grants an overshield; final blows extend its duration. When it ends, gain a damage bonus to your Arc weapons. Increased mobility.

691578979.name: Shards of Galanor
691578979.perkDescription: Throwing Knife final blows decrease the cooldown of your Super. Hitting a single target with most Blade Barrage knives in a volley causes them to release a violent Solar explosion; releasing scorching Solar shrapnel. Hits and final blows with Blade Barrage will return Super energy after the Super ends.

994038265.name: The Stag
994038265.perkDescription: Your Rift provides damage reduction to allied Guardians standing in it. Grants Rift energy when you are critically wounded. On your death, creates a healing rift on your corpse.

508515818.name: Mask of Bakris
508515818.perkDescription: While you have a Stasis or Arc Super equipped, your Dodge becomes a longer range, faster moving shift that partially cloaks you during use. After shifting, your Stasis and Arc weapons gain a stacking damage bonus for a short time. Final blows with this bonus active refund class ability energy.

4029987901.name: Secant Filaments
4029987901.perkDescription: While using a Void Super, casting an Empowering Rift will grant you Devour. Damage dealt by you and your allies from within your Empowering Rift will [Disruption] disrupt combatants. Defeating a target while Devour is active grants you class ability energy.

192896783.name: Cyrtarachne's Facade
192896783.perkDescription: Activating Grapple grants Woven Mail. While active, Woven Mail provides flinch resistance and health when defeating targets.

2773056939.name: Graviton Forfeit
2773056939.perkDescription: Increases the duration of any invisibility effects. When you gain invisibility, your grenade, melee and class abilities recharge faster. At maximum stacks, you gain a Void Overshield as well.

3688534631.name: Mothkeeper's Wraps
3688534631.perkDescription:
Defeat targets to charge up cages of loyal moths that fly toward nearby targets or allies.
 
[Grenade]  : Throw the cage of loyal moths, which are released on impact. Upon reaching targets, moths detonate in a blinding explosion; upon reaching allies, moths provide a Void overshield.

4268030601.name: Second Chance
4268030601.perkDescription: Gain a second charge of your Shield Throw melee. Your Shield Throws now weaken targets, create a Void Breach on final blows, and become shield-piercing, stunning [Shield-Piercing] Barrier Champions and refunding a Shield Throw charge when you do. Picking up a Void Breach grants you Shield Throw energy.

4157369212.name: Wishful Ignorance
4157369212.perkDescription: Gain an additional Frenzied Blade charge. Frenzied Blade and Flechette Storm briefly increase their damage with each strike. Pulses from your Banner of War return melee energy based on the number of allies healed.

2405271938.name: Orpheus Rig
2405271938.perkDescription: Provides ability energy for each target tethered by Deadfall anchors. Moebius Quiver has an additional shot.

1179169099.name: Wings of Sacred Dawn
1179169099.perkDescription: While you have a [Solar]Solar Super equipped, aiming weapons while you're midair suspends you there for a short time. While this effect is active, you are more resistant to incoming damage and combatants are less accurate. Weapon hits extend this effect's duration, and [Solar]Solar weapon final blows provide Restoration and reload your other weapons from reserves. Provides a large benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of all weapons.

4010324161.name: Fortune's Favor
4010324161.perkDescription:
After landing a final blow while at full health, or when out of combat for an extended duration, your shields will slowly recharge into an overshield. 

When you have an overshield, your weapons gain increased accuracy, stability, handling, and damage against combatants, and final blows will grant a short period of increased mobility once the overshield is depleted.

2523259392.name: Eye of Another World
2523259392.perkDescription: Highlights priority targets and improves the regeneration speed of your grenade, melee, and Rift abilities. Provides a small benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of all weapons. Increased mobility.

3960926756.name: Celestial Nighthawk
3960926756.perkDescription: Precision final blows reduce the cooldown of your Super. Modifies Golden Gun to fire a single, high-damage shot. Targets defeated by that shot give you Super energy and explode.

3717431477.name: Wishful Ignorance
3717431477.perkDescription: Gain an additional Frenzied Blade charge. Frenzied Blade and Flechette Storm briefly increase their damage with each strike. Pulses from your Banner of War return melee energy based on the number of allies healed.

4184605701.name: Praxic Vestment
4184605701.perkDescription:
You gain an air move jetpack. Weapon and Arc powered melee final blows build up Jetpack Fuel.

While airborne, [Air Dodge] : Charge your jetpack.

On release, activate your jetpack with a forceful blast of exhausting Arc energy then fly forward a short distance based on the amount charged. Collide with a combatant to unleash a blinding blast of energy and gain a temporary bonus to your melee stat.

1203306857.name: Ashen Wake
1203306857.perkDescription: Fusion Grenades gain increased throw speed, explode on impact, and stun Unstoppable Champions. Final blows with Fusion Grenades grant grenade energy.

1688602431.name: Sealed Ahamkara Grasps
1688602431.perkDescription: Powered melee and finisher final blows grant Nightmare Fuel, increasing handling and airborne effectiveness. While active, freshly drawn weapons deal additional damage and grant Nightmare Fuel on final blows. Gaining Nightmare Fuel reloads all holstered weapons.

2732820041.name: Mantle of Battle Harmony
2732820041.perkDescription: Final blows or sustained damage with weapons matching your equipped Super damage type grant you Super energy. When your Super energy is full, you instead gain a temporary bonus to weapon damage of that type. When you've exhausted your Super, matching elemental weapons' damage temporarily causes explosions around the target.

90009855.name: Arbor Warden
90009855.perkDescription: Using your class ability channels defensive Light inward, providing a grenade that creates a barricade on impact. Picking up Orbs of Power enhances your next Barri-nade, spawning more barricades on impact.

3787517196.name: Sunbracers
3787517196.perkDescription: Increases the duration of Solar Grenades. Solar melee kills grant unlimited Solar Grenade energy for a brief time.

2523259393.name: Nezarec's Sin
2523259393.perkDescription: Void final blows increase ability energy recharge rate. Combatants affected by Soul Siphon are suppressed. Defeating suppressed targets grants more time to Abyssal Extractors. Increased mobility.

3295711091.name: Liar's Handshake
3295711091.perkDescription: Using your Arc melee ability or being hit by a melee attack will allow you to follow up with an extremely powerful melee counterpunch that will heal you. Increased mobility.

943320520.name: Helm of Saint-14
943320520.perkDescription:
Weapons of Light persists after exiting Ward of Dawn. While Weapons of Light is active, final blows or sustained damage grant stacks of The Saint; Void and Kinetic damage sources also trigger a suppressing burst.
 
Picking up Ward of Dawn consumes all stacks of The Saint and extends its duration based on how many stacks were consumed.

418363297.name: Lunafaction Boots
418363297.perkDescription: Increases hip-fire range and accuracy for Primary ammo weapons. Your Rifts gain the additional ability to increase weapon reload speeds. Empowering Rift makes weapons effective at longer ranges.

1667080810.name: Celestial Nighthawk
1667080810.perkDescription: Precision final blows reduce the cooldown of your Super. Modifies Golden Gun to fire a single, high-damage shot. Targets defeated by that shot give you Super energy and explode. Increased resilience.

197761152.name: Mask of the Quiet One
197761152.perkDescription: Grants ability energy when you are damaged. While you have a Void super equipped, rapid final blows and final blows while critically wounded grant Devour. Increased mobility.

768145972.name: Briarbinds
768145972.perkDescription: Your Void Souls have a longer duration. They also gain escalating damage and durability as they defeat targets. You can retrieve your Void Souls by interacting with them, allowing them to be redeployed.

3642110725.name: Ophidia Spathe
3642110725.perkDescription: Gain a second knife per charge. Getting a final blow with a throwing knife grants consecutive knives a temporary stacking damage bonus. Gambler's Dodge refreshes the bonus timer.

370930766.name: Wings of Sacred Dawn
370930766.perkDescription: While you have a [Solar]Solar Super equipped, aiming weapons while you're midair suspends you there for a short time. While this effect is active, you are more resistant to incoming damage and combatants are less accurate. Weapon hits extend this effect's duration, and [Solar]Solar weapon final blows provide Restoration and reload your other weapons from reserves. Provides a large benefit to the airborne effectiveness stat of all weapons.

3948284065.name: Astrocyte Verse
3948284065.perkDescription:
With Blink equipped, use [Air Dodge]  while airborne to perform a Dark Blink.

Using Blink or Dark Blink grants Volatile Rounds. Blink travels farther, causes nearby targets to become volatile, and has a shorter cooldown. While your Nova Warp Super is active, Dark Blink does not cost Super energy. Provides a moderate benefit to airborne effectiveness for all weapons.

4057875770.name: Cuirass of the Falling Star
4057875770.perkDescription: Greatly increases your Thundercrash damage and grants you damage resistance after impact. Melee final blows while amplified grant you Super energy.

3637722482.name: Abeyant Leap
3637722482.perkDescription: Improves Drengr's Lash and spawns additional projectiles. These projectiles track targets more aggressively, travel farther, and suspend stronger. Gain Woven Mail when you suspend a target.

3883866764.name: Mask of the Quiet One
3883866764.perkDescription: Grants ability energy when you are damaged. While you have a Void super equipped, rapid final blows and final blows while critically wounded grant Devour.

1098931325.name: Shards of Galanor
1098931325.perkDescription: Throwing Knife final blows decrease the cooldown of your Super. Hitting a single target with most Blade Barrage knives in a volley causes them to release a violent Solar explosion; releasing scorching Solar shrapnel. Hits and final blows with Blade Barrage will return Super energy after the Super ends. Increased mobility.

2389062558.name: Contraverse Hold
2389062558.perkDescription: Resist incoming damage while charging your Void grenade with Chaos Accelerant. Charged Void grenades return grenade energy on a hit and apply Weaken. Increased mobility.

2094927311.name: Hallowfire Heart
2094927311.perkDescription:
While your Solar Super is charged, ability final blows cure you and give stacks of Sunfire Furnace.

While Sunfire Furnace is active, grenade and Shieldburst final blows trigger an ignition. Each stack increases grenade regeneration, class ability regeneration, and Super damage. Upon exiting your Super, all stacks are converted into Super energy.

3844826443.name: Winter's Guile
3844826443.perkDescription: Melee and finisher final blows increase melee damage. With maximum stacks, you gain vastly increased melee regeneration speed for a short time.

809007410.name: Ashen Wake
809007410.perkDescription: Fusion Grenades gain increased throw speed, explode on impact, and stun Unstoppable Champions. Final blows with Fusion Grenades grant grenade energy. Increased resilience.

1249787553.name: One-Eyed Mask
1249787553.perkDescription: Highlights the target who dares to damage you. Track down and destroy them for an overshield.

1245809812.name: Lucky Pants
1245809812.perkDescription: Improves sprint, slide, and airborne effectiveness while a Hand Cannon is equipped. For a short time after being drawn, Hand Cannons ready faster, are more accurate, and each hit against a combatant increases Hand Cannon damage. Increased mobility.

2553961985.name: Verity's Brow
2553961985.perkDescription: Weapon final blows with a damage type matching your grenade grant Death Throes, which provide a grenade damage bonus and grant you grenade energy. When you have Death Throes and throw a grenade, nearby allies gain greatly increased grenade regeneration for a short time.

1484674161.name: Ursa Furiosa
1484674161.perkDescription: Move faster while guarding with Sentinel Shield or the Unbreakable shield. Damage blocked with Sentinel Shield is converted to Super energy, and damage blocked with Unbreakable is converted to grenade energy. Increased resilience.

1035680664.name: ACD/0 Feedback Fence
1035680664.perkDescription: Melee hits grant Armor Charge, and you take less melee damage from combatants while you have Armor Charge. Taking melee damage causes you to emit a burst of damaging Arc energy that jolts targets, consuming your Armor Charge and dealing more damage based on the number of stacks consumed. Increased resilience.

1591207519.name: Crest of Alpha Lupi
1591207519.perkDescription: Generates an additional Orb of Power from Supers. Generating a Barricade, or dealing sustained damage or defeating targets from behind one creates a healing pulse. Healing your allies grants Barricade energy.

3987871714.name: Sealed Ahamkara Grasps
3987871714.perkDescription: Powered melee and finisher final blows grant Nightmare Fuel, increasing handling and airborne effectiveness. While active, freshly drawn weapons deal additional damage and grant Nightmare Fuel on final blows. Gaining Nightmare Fuel reloads all holstered weapons.
